title: The Raid Turns Across Onigashima
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Nami, Unknown person #1, Big Mom, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as Battles spread through the Skull Dome while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the alliance shift the momentum.
scene: Across the Skull Dome, the alliance fights to survive while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the Straw Hats change the flow of battle.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That guy... I wouldn't be surprised if he broke every bone in his body after their last attack.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hey, Traf, what're you doing!? Huff, huff...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That flame thing is gonna save big mom!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The plan isn't worth one of us dying!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We only needed to split them up anyway!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This should be enough!! FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 31 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
